## DayZ Server Manager v1.0.1

Fixes the release ZIP: includes the **`web/`** folder required next to `DayZManager.exe` for the Web UI.

### Download

**`dayz_manager-v1.0.1-windows-x64.zip`** — contains:

- `DayZManager.exe`
- `web/` (UI)
- `bercon-cli.exe`
- `config/config-host-template.json`

See [docs/RELEASES.md](https://github.com/devmrbouh-hub/dayz_manager/blob/main/docs/RELEASES.md).

### Upgrading from v1.0.0 ZIP

If the UI was blank or broken, unzip this release **fully** (do not copy only the EXE). Replace the whole folder or at least both `DayZManager.exe` and `web\`.
